reasoning: Progressive is formed by adding a copy of the stem (without the -um- infix written as mu/me) to the right. temulu = te + mu + lu → stem without -um- is telu → temulutelu.
Here the -um- infix appears as em after dje-. Remove it to get the stem avac, then suffix that copy: djemavac + avac.
le + me + nguaq shows the -um- infix. Remove it for the stem lenguaq and suffix it: lemenguaq + lenguaq.
No -um- infix. For such verbs, copy the final syllable to form the progressive. Final syllable is kel; attaching it causes l+k to simplify to k: mikerekel + kel → mikerekekel.
No -um- infix and final syllable is light, so copy the last two syllables lava: takalava + lava.
No -um- infix and the final syllable is heavy; copy the last syllable lit. To break the tl cluster at the junction, insert i: masasevalit + lit → masasevalitilit.
